decision.read: keep this in CPU/offline benchmark mode until oracle, confidence, direct-control, and stability gates pass.

next_steps: Use this as permission for a bounded frozen-feature downstream canary only, not larger training.
Do not treat bridge pseudo-label gains as real downstream model training proof.
decision.read: bridge proxy is aggregated with episode-level paired intervals; use it as an identifiability gate, not real challenge-label downstream proof.

gates.name: episode_count
gates.read: 18 independent final episodes; require at least 20 before downstream spend.

gates.name: large_training_baseline_delta_ci
gates.read: window_kcenter_v1 vs quality_stratified_random_v1 CI low is 0.0231; require > 0.04 before large downstream spend.

gates.name: oracle_headroom_sanity
gates.read: oracle_greedy_target_family_v1 headroom median is 0.0538 with positive fraction 0.6111; require positive median and >= 0.70 positive fraction.

gates.name: tiny_probe_random_delta
gates.read: window_kcenter_v1 vs quality_stratified_random_v1: CI low 0.0231, median 0.0338, win fraction 0.5556; tiny-probe threshold is CI low >= 0.02, median >= 0.025, win fraction >= 0.70.

gates.name: tiny_probe_replay_null
gates.read: window_kcenter_v1 replay percentile , +1 p-value , replay-mean CI low .

gates.name: tiny_probe_direct_controls
gates.read: ts2vec_kcenter_v1 must beat window_kcenter_v1 and submitted_full_replay_v1 by paired mean and median.

gates.name: tiny_probe_stability
gates.read: ts2vec_kcenter_v1 stability: positive seed fraction 1.0000, positive fold fraction 1.0000, min leave-one-seed 0.0361, min leave-one-fold 0.0424.

quality_only_v1.warning: Raw oracle capture is unstable when oracle-baseline headroom is small or negative; do not gate on the mean.

submitted_full_replay_v1.warning: Raw oracle capture is unstable when oracle-baseline headroom is small or negative; do not gate on the mean.

ts2vec_kcenter_v1.warning: Raw oracle capture is unstable when oracle-baseline headroom is small or negative; do not gate on the mean.

window_kcenter_v1.warning: Raw oracle capture is unstable when oracle-baseline headroom is small or negative; do not gate on the mean.

expanded_cpu_validation.decision_use: pre-registered bar for the expanded 10-seed, 8-fold, pool-stress CPU validation
expanded_cpu_validation.scope: Unlock only a bounded frozen-feature downstream canary; keep TS2Vec retraining and large neural training held.
